description: Sorriva — pre-build deploy. Splash page, roadmap, sessions, and version files. No application code yet.

files.description: Marketing splash page — live at sorriva.app via Cloudflare Pages
Full 8-phase roadmap with 66 features. Single source of truth for all feature tracking.
Velocity tracking — 2 planning sessions logged, 80 equivalent dev hours, 4 owner hours.
App version state. v0.0.1 pre-build — no features shipped yet.
Full product context document — architecture, features, brand, decisions log.
Branded HTML version of the product context document.

deploy_instructions.cloudflare_pages: Deploy index.html to the sorriva.app Cloudflare Pages project root. All other files go to the static/ directory alongside it.
deploy_instructions.hub_registration: Add sorriva entry to the Passione portfolio hub manifest pointing at this package's roadmap-data.json, sessions.json, and version.json.
deploy_instructions.github: Push all files to github.com/tomfo/sorriva once repo is created.
